metadata.name: qgepqwat2ili
metadata.summary: Toolkit to import/export between QGEP/QWAT and their counterpart SIA405 interlis model exchange files

This currently is expected to fail until we properly support exporing hydraulics

classes.name: qgepqwat2ili.processing_algs.extractlabels_interlis.ExtractlabelsInterlisAlgorithm
documentation:
This runs the native extractlabels algorithm for the given scales, and attaches obj_id and scale to the results.

Otherwise, the output is difficult to use, because the FeatureID isn't stable (since it's the primary
key of the reach and structure views is not an integer)

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.qgepsia405.export.qgep_export_sia405
documentation:
Export data from the QGEP model into the ili2pg model.

Args:
    selection:      if provided, limits the export to networkelements that are provided in the selection

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.qgepsia405.import_.qgep_import_sia405
documentation:
Imports data from the ili2pg model into the QGEP model.

Args:
    precommit_callback: optional callable that gets invoked with the sqlalchemy's session,
                        allowing for a GUI to  filter objects before committing. It MUST either
                        commit or rollback and close the session.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.tests.test_qgep.TestQGEPUseCases.test_case_a_import_wincan_xtf
documentation:
# A. import Wincan-generated xtf data into QGEP

We recieve data from a TV inspection company as a valid VSA_KEK_2019_LV95*.xtf exported file. We want this TV inspection data loaded into QGEP. It fits the demodata of the network.

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.import_submodules
documentation:
Import all submodules of a module, recursively, including subpackages

```
param package

package (name or actual module)

type package

str | module

rtype

dict[str, types.ModuleType]
```

Taken from <https://stackoverflow.com/a/25562415/13690651>

documentation: Is executed when the user clicks the exportAction tool

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.configure_from_modelbaker

Configures config.JAVA/ILI2PG paths using modelbaker.
Returns whether modelbaker is available, and displays instructions if not.

classes.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.factory
documentation: Creates an Editor instance, choosing the correct subclass from the registry

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.listitem
documentation: The editor's listitem (created on the fly if needed)

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.widget
documentation: The editor's widget (created on the fly if needed)

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.preprocess
documentation: Run some preprocessing steps (such as auto-assigning data)... To be overriden by subclasses.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.init_widget
documentation: Initialize the widget here, for things like connecting signals... To be overriden by subclasses.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.update_widget
documentation: Update the widget here, for things like repopulating from session... To be overriden by subclasses.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.update_state
documentation: Updates status and calls validate. Call this when the underlying object may have changed.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.validate
documentation: Updates validity and message. To be overriden by subclasses. You should probably call update_state if you need to revalidate.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.gui.editors.base.Editor.initially_checked
documentation: Determines if the item must be initially checked. To be overriden by subclasses.

Base class to manage import options for QGEP classes.

Editor subclasses are responsible of:
- managing a listwidgetitem
- providing a widget to edit options
- change the current session objects according to widget interaction
- validate objects according to the current session

classes.name: qgepqwat2ili.utils.ili2db.TidMaker
documentation:
Helper class that creates globally unique integer primary key forili2pg class (t_id)
from a a QGEP/QWAT id (obj_id or id).

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.utils.various.setup_test_db
documentation:
As initializing demo data can be a bit slow,
we do these steps in a Docker container then commit it to an image, so we can
start a clean database relatively quickly.

We prepare two template databases : full, empty
And then copy those to config.PGDATABASE when needed to initialize an fresh db
for testing.

functions.name: qgepqwat2ili.utils.various.read_pgservice

documentation: Returns the pgconf as a psycopg2 connection string

classes.name: qgepqwat2ili.utils.various.DeduplicatedLogger
documentation:
Logger that deduplicates messages

Multiple subsequent logging with the same message/level will result in [repeated N times]
message instead of many lines.

methods.name: qgepqwat2ili.utils.qgep_export_utils.QgepExportUtils.emptystr_to_null
documentation:
Converts blank strings to nulls and raises a warning

This is needed as is seems ili2pg 4.4.6 crashes with emptystrings under certain circumstances (see https://github.com/QGEP/qgepqwat2ili/issues/33)
